content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Twilight Inquisitor", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Cleric", "oracle_text": "Lifelink
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, that player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": ""In darkness or light, the truth demands its price."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "WB signpost for life manipulation archetype. Lifelink provides consistent lifegain, while the combat trigger creates additional drain effects. At 2/2 for 3 mana, it's aggressively costed to encourage attacking. The triggered ability creates incremental advantage and fits WB's drain theme."}, {"name": "Stormcaller Adept", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["U", "R"], "color_identity": ["U", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Prowess
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, ~ gets +1/+0 until end of turn and deals 1 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": "Lightning follows thought as surely as thunder follows lightning.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "UR signpost for spells matter archetype. Prowess provides consistent growth, while the triggered ability rewards instant/sorcery casting with both offensive power and direct damage. The 1 damage trigger fits red's direct damage identity while blue provides the spell synergy framework."}, {"name": "Graveroot Shaman", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "G"], "color_identity": ["B", "G"], "type_line": "Creature — Elf Shaman", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill three cards.
{2}{B}{G}, {T}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.", "flavor_text": "Death feeds the roots, and the roots remember all.", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "BG signpost for graveyard recursion archetype. ETB mill fills the graveyard (green self-mill + black graveyard interaction), while the activated ability provides repeatable recursion. High toughness encourages defensive play and protects the recursion engine. The activation cost requires both colors to emphasize multicolor identity."}, {"name": "Weaponmaster Veteran", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R", "W"], "color_identity": ["R", "W"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "Whenever ~ becomes equipped, it gains haste until end of turn.
Whenever ~ attacks, if it's equipped, it deals 1 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""A blade is only as sharp as the hand that wields it."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "RW signpost for aggro equipment archetype. First ability provides immediate attack capability when equipped (red haste + white equipment synergy). Second ability rewards equipped attacking with direct damage, combining red's aggressive damage with white's equipment theme. Solid 2/3 body for aggressive strategies."}, {"name": "Verdant Archivist", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G", "U"], "color_identity": ["G", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Elf Druid", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge grows in the spaces between root and stone.", "power": "1", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "GU signpost for ramp/card advantage archetype. ETB provides immediate ramp (green's strength), while the landfall trigger converts land drops into cards (blue's card draw + green's land synergy). High toughness and low power encourage defensive/value play. Creates strong synergy with additional land drops and ramp spells."}]}
